differentials.name: cranial neuropathy: high frequency hearing loss
differentials.raw: cranial neuropathy: high frequency hearing loss (CN VIII), tinnitus, facial motor dysfunction (CN VII), facial sensory dysfunction (CN V), taste disturbance (chorda tympani)

differentials.name: Exophytic brainstem glioma mnemonic:   Ever Grave CerebelloPontine Angle Masses
differentials.raw: Exophytic brainstem glioma mnemonic:   Ever Grave CerebelloPontine Angle Masses

context: =  extraaxial tumor arising in CSF-filled space bound by pons + cerebellar hemisphere + petrous bone Frequency:   5-10% of all intracranial tumors √  may widen CSF space (cistern) in 25% √  bone erosion / hyperostosis √  sharp margination with brain Types: (a)  benign condition ›  trigeminal schwannoma ›  facial schwannoma ›  glossopharyngeal schwannoma Acoustic + trigeminal schwannoma, Aneurysm of basilar / vertebral artery, Arachnoid cyst Meningioma, Metastasis
